raw_data.transcript: Operator reports rising vibration near assembly line three.

raw_data.message: Maintenance history shows recurring thermal drift on the same cell.

fusion.semantic_summary: Assembly cell 3 shows thermal escalation, correlated vibration growth, and operator concern.

alerts.reasoning: Confidence remains acceptable, but the anomaly pattern merits elevated monitoring and human review.

reasoning.summary: Proactive trigger fired based on compounding temperature, vibration, and maintenance recurrence signals.

predictions.forecast: Thermal envelope likely exceeds operator threshold if load remains unchanged.

content.description: Line 3 multimodal anomaly consolidated into working memory.
content.query: Assess whether thermal instability is likely to intensify over the next quarter hour.

agents.name: Operations Supervisor
agents.description: Supervises live plant conditions and flags multimodal anomalies for human review.
agents.goal: Maintain safe operating conditions and escalate emerging multimodal anomalies.

agents.name: Incident Triage
agents.description: Correlates live multimodal signals with text and sensor context to triage operational incidents.
agents.goal: Classify incidents quickly and route them through governed response paths.

tools.name: Supervisor Notification
tools.description: Notify the shift supervisor with an operational summary.

tools.name: Incident Broadcast
tools.description: Notify the incident response channel with a structured triage output.

tasks.name: Watch Line Three
tasks.description: Continuously assess multimodal signals for early signs of instability on assembly line three.
tasks.query: Assess assembly line three for multimodal instability and escalate early risk patterns.

tasks.name: Triage Active Incident
tasks.description: Correlate current multimodal evidence and produce a safe incident routing decision.
tasks.query: Explain the likely cause of the active incident and determine the safest governed next action.

workflows.name: Supervise And Triage Incident
workflows.description: Detect early operational instability, then route the active incident through a governed triage pass.

task_runs.detail: Task completed via agent Operations Supervisor with governance action MONITOR.

workflow_runs.detail: Workflow stopped after task watch_line_three due to status monitored.

decision.reasoning: Governance permits observation and escalation without blocking the operator loop.

result.detail: Supervisor notification enqueued with anomaly summary and projected thermal drift.
